## CommandStatusRecord Class

Records the status of a command with terminal\-state\-specific fields\.
Non\-terminal states have null values for terminal\-specific fields\.

public record CommandStatusRecord : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatusRecord>
